root_nodes.description: Public API entry points (lib.rs) with re-exports of core types and the top-level parse, stringify, from functions, alongside the public Error enum (error.rs) that propagates parsing and type errors to users.

Encapsulates the core JSON data types: JsonValue enum, Object container (hash-indexed store), Number with mantissa/exponent representation, Short string optimization, and float conversion utilities (grisu2/diyfp) used by Number.
Implements the JSON parser using an internal Parser struct and helper macros to convert a &str source into a JsonValue, with depth limit and precision constants.
Provides code generators (Generator trait) for serializing JsonValue to compact/pretty strings or io::Write streams, including the decimal number formatting utility print_dec.

intermediate_nodes.description: Defines the public Error enum with variants for unexpected characters, EOF, depth limit, UTF-8 failure, and wrong type. Implements Display and std::error::Error.
Root module re-exporting Error, JsonValue, Null, parse. Defines type aliases (Result, Array, Members). Provides public functions from, stringify, stringify_pretty.
Private Parser struct with unsafe byte-level parsing logic. Exposes pub parse(source: &str) -> Result<JsonValue>. Manages depth limit and precision via const/static globals.

Core JsonValue enum (Null, Short, String, Number, Boolean, Object, Array) with type checks, conversions (as_str, as_f64, as_u64), container ops (push, insert, remove), and serialization entry points (dump, pretty, write).
Implements From<&str>, From<Vec>, From<HashMap>, etc. for JsonValue and various PartialEq comparisons.
Object struct using Vec<Node> with hash-indexed key lookups and inline-buffer Key optimization. Provides insert, get, remove, iter, dump (via codegen), pretty.
Number struct with (sign, mantissa, exponent). f64/f32 conversion via grisu2, integer conversion, fixed-point ops, Display via print_dec.
Short struct storing small strings inline in a fixed-size byte array. Used by JsonValue::Short for values up to MAX_LEN bytes.
Implements the Grisu2 algorithm leveraging DiyFp to convert an f64 into (u64 mantissa, i16 exponent) used by Number::from.
DiyFp struct for high-precision integer arithmetic on float-like values. Statically cached power tables for decimal normalization.
Generator trait with write_json, write_string, write_number, write_object. Concrete implementations: DumpGenerator, PrettyGenerator, WriterGenerator, PrettyWriterGenerator.
Unsafe helper function write() that formats a u64 mantissa and i16 exponent into decimal digits into an io::Write, using lookup tables for fast digit conversion.
Automatically attached during RPG validation because Phase 1 parsed this file but the LLM omitted it; parent inferred by matched existing header/source sibling.

inter_module_edges.description: The top-level pub fn parse(source: &str) -> Result<JsonValue> is re-exported from lib.rs and delegates directly to parser::parse, creating a data flow from API to parser.
inter_module_edges.evidence: lib.rs re_exports 'pub use parser::parse as parse' and standalone_functions stringify calls root.into then root.dump/root.pretty. parser.rs direct_calls on standalone_functions: parse -> Parser::new(source).parse

inter_module_edges.description: Parser::parse method constructs and returns JsonValue, JsonValue::Array, JsonValue::Object, Number, and uses Object::with_capacity/Object::insert_index, establishing data ownership transfer from parser to the data model layer.
inter_module_edges.evidence: parser.rs Parser::parse direct_calls include 'JsonValue::Array', 'Object::with_capacity', 'JsonValue::Object', 'JsonValue::Number', 'JsonValue::Boolean', 'object.insert_index', and 'Number::from_parts_unchecked' (via read_number macro)

inter_module_edges.description: JsonValue::dump/pretty and Object::dump/pretty directly instantiate DumpGenerator or PrettyGenerator and call gen.write_json(self)/gen.write_object(self), transferring the immutable reference for serialization. Number::fmt calls print_dec::write.
inter_module_edges.evidence: value/mod.rs JsonValue::dump: direct_calls ['DumpGenerator::new', 'gen.write_json(self).expect', 'gen.consume']; object.rs Object::dump: direct_calls ['DumpGenerator::new', 'gen.write_object(self).expect', 'gen.consume']; number.rs Display::fmt: direct_calls ['print_dec::write']

inter_module_edges.description: Generator::write_json and write_object introspect the internals of JsonValue (checks variants) and Number (num.as_parts, num.is_nan), reading the data model's fields for serialization.
inter_module_edges.evidence: codegen.rs Generator::write_json direct_calls include 'short.as_str', 'self.write_number', 'self.write_object', 'object.iter'; write_number uses 'num.as_parts', 'num.is_nan'; write_string_complex uses 'string.as_bytes'

intra_module_edges.description: Public API functions (from, stringify, stringify_pretty) that potentially call into value conversions return Result<T, Error> or propagate errors. The Error type is fundamental to all fallible operations.
intra_module_edges.evidence: lib.rs defines 'pub type Result<T> = result::Result<T, Error>' and re-exports Error. error.rs Error::wrong_type is called by value::push and value::insert for type mismatch errors.

intra_module_edges.description: JsonValue::Object variant delegates object operations (insert, remove, get, len, iter, clear) directly to the internal Object struct.
intra_module_edges.evidence: value/mod.rs JsonValue methods: insert calls 'object.insert', remove calls 'object.remove', len calls 'object.len', entries calls 'object.iter', clear calls 'object.clear'

intra_module_edges.description: JsonValue::Number variant delegates as_fixed_point_u64/i64, as_f64/f32 (via .into on Number), and Number-related operations to the Number struct.
intra_module_edges.evidence: value/mod.rs JsonValue::as_f64: direct_calls ['self.as_number().map', 'value.into']; as_fixed_point_u64: direct_calls ['value.as_fixed_point_u64']; as_number: returns 'Some' of embedded Number

intra_module_edges.description: JsonValue::Short variant uses Short struct; as_str() returns Short's as_str() for short strings.
intra_module_edges.evidence: value/mod.rs JsonValue::as_str for Short variant returns 'Some(short.as_str())'

intra_module_edges.description: The From<&str> implementation for JsonValue uses Short::from_slice for strings within MAX_LEN, connecting Short optimization to JsonValue creation.
Number::from(f64) and Number::from(f32) call grisu2::convert to transform a float into (mantissa, exponent) parts.
grisu2.rs convert() calls DiyFp::from_f64, normalized_boundaries, normalize, and diyfp::get_cached_power for its float-to-decimal conversion.
Generator::write_number calls print_dec::write to format number parts into decimal representation in the output buffer.
